review_title: My ultimate gem with payroll calculation and benefits administration.
description: Ultimate gem with payroll calculations, benefits administration and direct deposits.
author: ernest M.
pros: Ultimately helps to track employee hours. Exquisitely effective for payroll calculations, benefits and tax setups.
cons: Great for state regulations compliance and got no dislike.

description: Heartland treats us like a business partner and not like just another client.
author: Neil G.
pros: Heartland staff is very responsive and has helped us integrate with other vendors. Our sales rep, Michael, is very helpful. Any glitches are addressed and we have very few problems.
cons: I really don't have anything to add in the Cons section as Heartland's team has treated me well.

description: Started good and ended do to heartlands non responsiveness to support or other requests.
author: david S.
pros: we used it for years and at the beginning , Heartland provided great service for an affordable cost.
cons: time and labor was a separate company and cost. support became poor to non existent over time

author: Dylan S.
pros: Its simplistic and easy to navigate. There isn't added clutter to the front end for users allowing them to access their forms and information quickly easily.
cons: Time tracking tools could be laid out better. Its hard to calculate total hours when breaks are included as it splits them seperately.

description: It is a user-friendly interface with a good data encryption system
author: Floyd M.
pros: Its data encryption software is the best where no one can access the account.
cons: Its good but its little slow but no others challenges am finding

author: Joseph L.
pros: A wonderfully helpful and thoughtful team of associates. No problem is too small for them, and their responses are quick, thorough, and above all patient. We've worked with Heartland for just over one year and I couldn't be happier. Problems -- mostly on my end -- are resolved to my complete satisfaction.
cons: Reports are not intuitive but can be found with a little digging. Our rep is always ready to jump in and help us however.

description: The Staff is very friendly and were very helpful in helping me transition to Heartland Payroll.
author: Susan W.
pros: I like that when I need anything, like a question answered or how to get around the payroll program, I can always reach somebody immediately. Customer service is great!
cons: I really don't have any problems with this program. It was very user friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great. I enjoy the representatives and their thoroughness in verifying my credentials, helping with learning the system and recording time.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I enjoy the ease in which to complete payroll, notifications of payroll due dates and the team is very friendly and eager to assist.
cons: Heartland is effective, however, my company subscribes for self-servicing, so some features we do not take advantage of because our business model.

review_title: A Comprehensive Solution for Growing Businesses with Scalable Payroll and HR Needs
description: The platform is intuitive and designed with non-technical users in mind, so business owners and HR managers can easily navigate it without needing advanced software knowledge.
author: JILL A.
pros: One of the standout features is the automated tax filing, which ensures businesses never miss a filing deadline. The system handles both federal and state tax filings, including quarterly and annual tax reports, making compliance much simpler.
cons: While Heartland Payroll+ offers a degree of customization, certain features, like the user interface or specific HR workflows, might not be as flexible as some businesses would prefer.

review_title: A complete payroll package for HR
description: Pleasant experience with the automatic payroll system. I do not have to spend countless hours to calculate wages manually anymore.
author: Walach A.
pros: It is more than just a payroll software, it also cover our business need for human resource software, time & attendance, and payroll processing. Working productivity is boosted after we change to modern timesheets to track billable hours, clock-in and build accurate report for shift scheduling. Tracking employees hours help to ensure worker is paid fairly by their working hours and reduce calculation mistake when calculating their monthly wages. It also help HR to process time off request by simple click either to accept or not accept the request. All this features is on one platform.
cons: Missing training course for HR to learn about the system. It would be more effective if we can sent our HR personnel for face to face training to learn all about the software and its limitation for a better understanding.

author: Stevan B.
pros: Easy access to view my payroll history and information. Can work from smartphone, which is very helpful. Accurate wages calculation and no delay in payment/deposit to my bank account. Overall, I seen a better payroll service/operation after we change to Heartland Payroll.
cons: Met the expectation that we need after the payroll operation is handled by professional. For me, I have no complaint or dislike with this software.

review_title: Heartland Payroll+ makes Payroll management easier
author: Ochuko O.
pros: Heartland Payroll is a tool that since adopted help us manage payroll processing with proper efficiency and accuracy, its a reliable tool and user-friendly payroll solution, it entails various unique features which benefits the organization policy, its time tracking integration and customizable reports make it a well rounded best tool that suit us, its automates salary calculations, direct deposits and deductions which helps saves time and minimize errors.
cons: I have nothing against this software using it, it does what we want with proper efficiency, no cons.

description: I have found Heartland very helpful form setting up new employees to actually being able to speak to a representative.
author: Adam J.
pros: Always helpful, as a new business owner I have made a few mistakes, and every time I all the help and fix it.
cons: none that I have experienced. I am very satisfied with the whole experience.

review_title: A payroll management of complete package
description: I have a pleasant experience using heartland payroll, especially with access to it at anytime and anywhere on my mobile
author: Amos J.
pros: Heartland Payroll offers a comprehensivenes that I really value. it offers everything needed for efficient payroll management. i can remotely access the platform and manage employees' payroll anywhere with my phone , ad the customer support is also excellent
cons: I have not experience any negatives in the while that I have been using it
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Helps me to organize payroll efficiently and run reports as needed. It simplifies my payroll processing and easily direct deposits employee pay.
author: Xavier J.
pros: I love the reports and analytics features and the payroll dashboards.
cons: I don't like how sometimes it takes a while to get some updates done.

review_title: payroll management with ease and accuracy
description: smart and responsive customer support with great features which makeall the difference
author: Michael N.
pros: I like the simple interface and all the features are relevant for managing payrolls easily and effectively without any singifivant error
cons: I didn't encountered any in my experienc with heartland payroll
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is a great tool for small businesses looking to simplify payroll management and compliance.
author: Ava H.
pros: I used it to manage payroll for my team, and it made everything from direct deposits to tax filing incredibly simple.
cons: The interface could be a bit more intuitive for new users, but once I got used to it, processing payroll was quick.

description: having a system that helps you automate stafss payment in a non tech industry is a big bonus. heartland payroll delivers this and more from payment automation to tracking of human capital I didn't have to employ more staff to handle all this with the help of heartland payroll
author: Emerald F.
pros: Ny favorite feature is heartland is the easy access my employee have to the basic feature through the mobile app with this all my staff could acess the software at no extra cost other features that made the software special is the workable interface, customizable dashboard and their professional customer service
cons: No even one feature to dislike heartland payroll is a complete package and I wll continue using it
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It helps me solve all my payroll deduction and it's very accurate and easy to read.
author: Nishmitha G.
pros: I like that it offers the ability to import data into payroll batches which increases the efficiency of payroll processing.
cons: The cost is a bit pricey otherwise it's very easy to navigate and customer service is very responsive.

review_title: Heartland Payroll+ is our secret weapon for finessing HR and payroll operations.
description: We are been able to achieve a very successful HR and payroll experience with Heartland Payroll+. It provides us with all the right tools we ever need to streamline our HR operations from the initial stage of recruiting up to the very last one. It also has a very competent payroll tool that makes payroll processing such an easy and effective task for us.
author: James L.
pros: Heartland Payroll+ has offered us an automated payroll processing function that help us to run payrolls precisely without any errors. It has made recruiting very simple by offering us a safe vault to assemble all candidates information. It provides us with in-depth reports that allows us to track our recruiting process from start to the end. Heartland Payroll+ has an incredible time tracking tool that keeps us always right on schedule.
cons: Heartland Payroll+ support team is easy to reach and has helped us attain a very flawless experience. No hate towards it or any of its features.

review_title: Very user friendly and intuitive payroll management software
description: The interface is easy and intuitive to use and allows me to store all of my paystubs in one place so i can check back on different pay periods.
author: Asnath G.
pros: I like that i can process payroll,print checks and run reports by myself. Easy to navigate and customer service is fast and responsive.
cons: So far i have no complaints about the product.

review_title: The heart of every HR my review in Heartland payroll
description: we used Heartland Payroll+successfully and it gave us exactly what my company HR needed with its smooth and cost effective operation
author: Rosemary O.
pros: Heartland payroll helped me to manage my hr onboarding from recruitment to final phase, I also like how efficient the payroll processing is, heartland payroll data management is secure and safe for important files
cons: I couldn't find any con in Heartland payroll so far it's been working real good
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Heartland Payroll+ Is an Impactful Payroll Management Tool
description: I am glad because the experience we have with Heartland Payroll+ has been sensational due to its powerful features.
author: Karatina M.
pros: Heartland Payroll+ has been an incredible and impactful payroll management solution. It has comprehensive features that are so accurate.
cons: All the features of Heartland Payroll+ have been meeting our expectations.

author: Meline H.
pros: Work very well with our HRIS system really make me happy. It is mostly because Heartland is easy to integrate and solved every issues that we had in managing payroll and payment. All the data is secure and has no issues.
cons: Nothing to dislike. All the tools and features met our expectation and what we need from a payroll software.

review_title: Accurate and Significant Payroll Processing Approach
description: Heartland Payroll+ equips companies with quality payment mechanisms, where all employees get their money on time. Further. Heartland Payroll+ has speedy processing power, which saves on users time.
author: Jervis I.
pros: Heartland Payroll+ makes the process of payroll successful, where all the allocances are well included and payments are made ASAP. Heartland Payroll+ has quality communications solution, that gives users satisfaction and confidence. Heartland Payroll+ is secure, and intruders are captured before they mess with the system.
cons: Heartland Payroll+ is systematic, with quality features and no complaints experienced.
